Let me give you another tonality per second called absolute certainty. Now notice I make this move. You see me do it here a bunch of times I say, and listen, the bottom line and I smack my hand into my palm, the back of my hand into my palm, and it makes me get to that next level of certainty. That's the tone of absolute certainty. And you notice that I'm always kind of moving my body around and creating that energy using my physiology. Now typically just, you know, again as I took my tie off I seldom even wear a jacket because typically when I'm selling, watch, I will never sell with a jacket on unless I was in a specific situation where I actually had to have a jacket. I would take my jacket off here, just throw this over here to the side, okay, and I roll my sleeves up and this is typically my mode of selling where I'm most comfortable. Tie it off, shirt sleeve rolled up and imagine how you see typically most people when they're in their mode walking around in the groove and I'm moving my body and you'll notice that you can generate these emotions, these tonalities, much, much easier. Now notice when I actually almost misspoke my thought, I said, you generate these emotions, I said, oops, I mean tonalities, but actually they're one and the same. See my tonalities are actually the emotions that are attached to my words. So if I say to you, you know, scarcely it's in short supply, well you don't really quite feel it, the emotion of scarcity, but when I say, listen, it's in short supply, and I put my hands in, I close, it's in short supply, there's an emotional feeling that the word creates. There's almost this law of physiology that the more you move your body, the easier it is to maintain that peak positive state. You know, you move your body and it sort of almost triggers the emotion. So I want to be aware as I move my body, as you're watching my words come out of my mouth, notice how I will use my physiology to help me muster those certain tonalities. Manage your voice in a way where you create an unconscious dialogue in the other person. They actually start hearing words that you're not saying, you end up controlling the conversation every step of the way and have their unconscious dialogue working for you versus against you.
